dict.string: $(CAPACITOR_DEBUG)
en
GIGI
$(EXECUTABLE_NAME)
$(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER)
$(PRODUCT_NAME)
APPL
$(MARKETING_VERSION)
$(CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION)
GIGI uses Bluetooth to connect to your smart devices, AirPods, and car systems to offer you total hands-free voice control.
GIGI accesses Bluetooth while in use to communicate with nearby accessories and manage smart home commands.
GIGI accesses your calendar to read your schedule, notify you of appointments, and organize your days like a true assistant.
GIGI needs to write to your calendar to automatically add bookings and events you request via voice command.
GIGI uses the camera to analyze the world around you, read QR codes, and help you with visual artificial intelligence.
GIGI accesses your contacts to allow you to call or message anyone with a simple voice command.
GIGI uses Face ID to protect your personal data and securely authorize your voice bookings and payments.
GIGI uses the local network to connect to your smart devices, home lights, and home automation systems, allowing you to control them with simple voice commands wherever you are.
GIGI needs access to your location to control your smart devices, home lights, and communicate with your computer to execute your orders.
GIGI needs to listen to your orders to pass them to OpenClaw.
GIGI needs to save images and documents to your library when you ask it to store receipts, screenshots, or important files.
GIGI accesses your photos to analyze them with artificial intelligence, help you organize them, and remember your special moments on your command.
GIGI accesses your Reminders to add tasks, deadlines, and shopping lists you request vocally, helping you not forget anything.
GIGI integrates with Siri to allow you to activate artificial intelligence via quick voice commands and manage your requests even with the screen off.
GIGI uses speech recognition to understand your desires.
LaunchScreen
Main
